title: Justice Dept. Clears Way for Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger

summary: If you have index funds — such as in a 401(k) — they may soon include shares of the mega company. Here’s a rough calculation.

title: A Family Ravaged by Land Mines in Myanmar
summary: Bu Ri lost a leg to a mine in Myanmar decades ago. More recently, six other members of his family have suffered a similar fate or worse, in a sign of the devastation wreaked by civil war.
